description: Teaching, training, education technology and academic careers.

careers.name: School Teacher
careers.overview: School Teacher is an education career focused on teaching, learning design, student development and academic systems.
careers.whyChoose: School Teacher offers meaningful work, stable demand and opportunities in schools, colleges, training and education technology.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 followed by graduation; B.Ed, D.El.Ed, NET or specialization may be required for some roles.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Graduation -> Teaching/training qualification -> Internship/practice -> Education role.
careers.workEnvironment: Schools, colleges, coaching centers, EdTech companies, training teams, NGOs and policy organizations.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to online learning, skill development, inclusive education and lifelong learning.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support lesson planning and assessment while human mentorship, classroom judgement and empathy remain essential.
